title: Netsol Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Netsol Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
